# PERF-069 negative: c.Writer.Flush() is called after writes
lang: go
file: PERF-069-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func StreamWithFlush(c *gin.Context) {
	chunk := []byte("hello world\n")
	c.Writer.Write(chunk)
	c.Writer.Flush()
	c.Writer.Write(chunk)
	c.Writer.Flush()
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
